form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after 16 months second last of 10 at this track Rtg 70+ on April 5 over 1230m, on a slow track; 25 len behind Wineaclocksumwhere carrying 56.5kg at $71. form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start favourite; was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by 0.5 len at this track Cl2 March 19 over 1230m on a rain affected track defeating Niccy's Affair carrying 60kg at $3.60. Before that ran on from midfield; 4th of 14 at this track Ladies Bracele on March 8 over 1500m, slow going nose behind Capricious Ruler carrying 56.5kg at $3.60. Flew home to win last start and can go on with the job.

The start before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 2 len at this track Cl2 March 26 over 1000m on a rain affected track defeating Brazen Bid with 55.5kg at $5.
